revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CS1_wrapper here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CS1_wrapper for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ombox|text=This template is a {{#switch:{{lc:{{{type|}}}}}
|meta=Citation Style 1 meta-template
|source=[[:Category:Citation Style 1 specific-source templates|Citation Style 1 specific-source template]]
|#default=Citation Style 1 [[Wikipedia:Wrapper templates|wrapper template]]
}} based on {{#switch:{{lc:{{str left|{{{base}}}|7}}}}
|module:=[[{{{base}}}]].
|#default={{tl|{{ucfirst:{{{base}}}}}}}.
}} For centrali{{#switch:{{lc:{{{spell|}}}}}|z=z|s|#default=s}}ed [[Help:Citation Style 1|Citation Style 1]] discussions, see [[Help talk:Citation Style 1]].}}<includeonly>{{category handler
|template = {{#switch:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}
  |doc
  |sandbox
  |testcases=<noinclude><!-- do not categorize template maintenance subpages -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
  |#default={{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{type|}}}}}|source|}}
}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates that wrap {{ucfirst:{{{base}}}}}]]
[[Category:Citation Style 1 specific-source templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
